title: JOYIN 50 pcs Play Food Set for Kids,Plastic Toy Kitchen Accessories with Fruits,Vegetables & Desserts,Pretend Play Food Toys for Toddlers 2,3,4,5, Bithday Gift for Kids
features: 50 PC COMPLETE PLAY FOOD TOY SET: Fuel imaginative kitchens with 50 lifelike pieces! Includes veggies (bell pepper, broccoli), fruits (strawberries, bananas), desserts (donuts, ice cream), pizza, eggs & more. Perfect for toy kitchens, grocery play, & toddler role play!

LEARNING THROUGH PLAY: Boost development with every pretend meal! Builds vocabulary (food names), social skills (sharing "dishes"), & fine motor control (handling small pieces). Ideal preschool educational toys for ages 2,3,4,5.
100% CHILD-SAFE & DURABLE: Non-toxic, BPA-free plastic compliant with UK Toy Safety Standards (EN71). Rounded edges, washable surfaces, & toddler-sized pieces. Worry-free play for little chefs!

PERFECT GIFT & PARTY FAVOR: Unbox joy at birthdays, Christmas, or playdates! Vibrant colors & realistic details delight kids. Includes pizza, cookies & pancakes for instant play. Pro Tip: Pair with play kitchen sets for ultimate fun!

ENDLESS IMAGINATIVE ADVENTURES: Inspire culinary creativity! "Cook" meals, stock play grocery stores, or host tea parties. Fits all major toy kitchens. JOYIN Guarantee: Message us via "Contact Seller" for instant support!
